message:
fix: replace hardcoded status strings with StatusOK/StatusWarning constants in legacy.go (bd-wif2)

All 16 DoctorCheck structs in legacy.go used raw string literals ("ok", "warning")
instead of the StatusOK and StatusWarning constants defined in types.go. This ensures
consistency and prevents drift if the constant values are ever changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
